creator: axl@iafrica.com
text:
rev1.26 of Makefile for www/netscape3 broken Fortification,
	because Fortify.sh now asks 3 questions, not 2.

Fix: The following diff teaches the Makefile to preempt Fortify.sh's
	questions correctly.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Completely remove netscape3, then

	cd /usr/ports/www/netscape3
	make -DUSA_RESIDENT=NO -DUSE_128BIT=YES
